steps.response:
I found several hotels in Rome for your 5‑day trip (May 2026). Below are three strong options that fit your $2,000 budget and 1 traveler profile — I highlighted a top pick and a vegan-friendly recommendation so you can choose what matters most (comfort, rating, or value). Tell me which one you prefer and I’ll book it or I can check availability for different dates.

Top pick — Foro Romano Luxury Suites (Best rated):
- Price: $427 / night • Total: $1,710
- Rating: 4.9 (75 reviews)
- Dates: 2026-05-10 to 2026-05-14
- Highlights: Elegant, refined rooms with some city views; complimentary Wi‑Fi; airport shuttle available. Great-for-relaxation and highly rated.

Vegan-friendly recommendation — Grand Hotel Palace Rome (Best facilities / in-room kitchen option):
- Price: $473 / night • Total: $1,891
- Rating: 4.5 (890 reviews)
- Dates: 2026-05-10 to 2026-05-14
- Highlights: On-site restaurant, terrace & spa; some rooms include a kitchen (handy for preparing vegan meals); accessible and many services.

Best value — Hotel Nord Nuova (Budget-friendly):
- Price: $207 / night • Total: $827
- Rating: 4.1 (1,632 reviews)
- Dates: 2026-05-10 to 2026-05-14
- Highlights: Lowest price, comfortable 1930s building, gym, restaurant. Good if you want to keep costs well under your $2,000 budget.

Notes & next steps:
- All options are within your $2,000 budget and the stay dates are in the future (check-in 2026-05-10, check-out 2026-05-14). You requested 5 days; these search results use 2026-05-10 → 2026-05-14 (4 nights). If you want a full 5 nights (5 nights / 6 days) I can re-run the search for different dates.
- If vegan meals are a top priority, Grand Hotel Palace is the best bet (restaurant + some rooms with a kitchen). I can also contact the hotel to confirm vegan menu options or arrange a room with a kitchenette.
- If you want maximum savings and still a comfortable stay, Hotel Nord Nuova is the clear value pick.

Which would you like to book or explore further? I can: 1) Reserve the room you pick, 2) Confirm vegan dining options/room types, or 3) Re-run the search for 5 full nights or different dates/number of travelers.

APPROVE: Good selection — hotels match Rome, dates, 1 traveler, and stay within the $2,000 budget. Two issues to confirm before booking: the plan uses May 10–14 (4 nights) though the request states a 5‑day trip—clarify desired nights; and the ‘vegan-friendly’ note for Grand Hotel should be verified with the property (onsite restaurant/kitchen helps but doesn’t guarantee vegan menu). Also note none of the options list a pool if that’s important. Otherwise this is ready to move forward.
